name: Random POP
description: The Random POP takes its input and either (1) generates a new attribute containing random values, or (2) sets, adds or multiplies an existing attribute by a random value for each point. The random values can be applied to point, vertex or primitive attributes. By default, the random values are uniformly distributed between 0 and 1, but there is a variety of alternate distributions controlled with the Type menu. These include Gaussian (also known as Normal) distribution (where most points are near the center of the range), two values randomly chosen with a fraction probability of each (Two Values), a random Direction vector (within a certain cone angle) which always has length of 1, random float3 vectors within a unit Sphere, and Exponential which is an exponential dropoff above 0 separately in each axis. The random values can be generated within a specified range (Value A and Value B), and then optionally clamped between two values. There is an option to generate 2 or more points for every input point to increase the density of points around the source points. (Extra Points per Source Point) The random values can also be restricted to certain point, vertex or primitive Groups. Tip: You can get random distributions radially around a point by using the [[Projection POP]] by generating random numbers in polar space and converting to Cartesian. '''Per-point mapping of parameters''' - The Random POP has a Map page, which allows every point to get a different value for Amplitude, Offset, Exponent, Period, Value A and B and other parameters. In this mechanism, a separate attribute in the input contains values that override (or add to / multiply by) the parameter value. See [[Mapping POP Attributes to Parameters]]. See also [[Point Generator POP]], [[Noise POP]]

parameters.name: Extra Points per Source Point
parameters.label: Extra Points per Source Point
parameters.description: Determines how many additional random points are generated per input point.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Determines the random type.

parameters.name: CHOP
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: When the distribution type is Custom Ramp, the CHOP to use for the custom ramp.

parameters.name: Random Size
parameters.label: Random Size
parameters.description: Number of random components.

parameters.name: Seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: Numerical value that initializes the randomization.

parameters.name: Parameter Size
parameters.label: Parameter Size
parameters.description: Number of independent configurable parameter values.

parameters.name: Amplitude
parameters.label: Amplitude
parameters.description: For certain types of random values, the random values amplitude (a scale on the values output).

parameters.name: Exponent
parameters.label: Exponent
parameters.description: Sets the exponent. The internal value is raised by the power of the exponent

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Adds an offset to the resulting value.

parameters.name: Value A
parameters.label: Value A
parameters.description: One of two values determining the random numbers that are output.

parameters.name: Value B
parameters.label: Value B
parameters.description: One of two values determining the random numbers that are output.

parameters.name: Value B Probability
parameters.label: Value B Probability
parameters.description: The probability that the numbers will be biased toward value B vs A.

parameters.name: Clamp Value
parameters.label: Clamp Value
parameters.description: Whether to clamp the output value between a minimum and a maximum.

parameters.name: Clamp Min
parameters.label: Clamp Min
parameters.description: Minimum output value.

parameters.name: Clamp Max
parameters.label: Clamp Max
parameters.description: Maximum output value.

parameters.name: Cone Direction
parameters.label: Cone Direction
parameters.description: When random distribution is direction, specifies the cone direction.

parameters.name: Cone Angle
parameters.label: Cone Angle
parameters.description: When random distribution is direction, specifies the cone angle around the cone direction.

parameters.name: Combine Operation
parameters.label: Combine Operation
parameters.description: Specify how to combine the output value with the combine attribute value.

parameters.name: Combine Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Combine Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Input attribute scope for the combine operation.

parameters.name: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.

parameters.name: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.label: Override Automatic Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to override the kind of attribute automatically created based on the POP input and parameters. Allows to specify manually the type and number of components of the new attribute.

parameters.name: Attribute Type
parameters.label: Attribute Type
parameters.description: The output attribute's data type, default float.

parameters.name: Components
parameters.label: Components
parameters.description: The number of components in the new custom attribute.

parameters.name: Default Value
parameters.label: Default Value
parameters.description: Default values of the output attribute components if they cannot be computed.

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: Group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this POP to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: Compute Point Normals
parameters.label: Compute Point Normals
parameters.description: Whether to compute point normals as a post operation.

parameters.name: Mapping
parameters.label: Mapping
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attribute-to-parameter mapping.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Random_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
